name: 24"x18" Abstract Lake Framed Wall Art - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Modern Decor, Polystyrene Gold & Black Frame
description:
Uplift your home decor with this serene 24"x18" Abstract Lake Framed Wall Art from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Featuring a photograph in soothing earth tones, it comes in a sophisticated gold and black polystyrene frame. Designed for horizontal display, it includes a convenient sawtooth back mount for easy hanging and display.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
